prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document is in Lithuanian and pertains to cervical screening invitations, which is specific to the National Health Service (NHS) processes. It does not directly apply to England or any UK nation as it is not in English and references health services that might not align with UK practices.
